document.name: Citadella Restaurant
document.shortDescription: Panoramic restaurant on Gellért Hill — Hungarian-European menu with terrace views from the Citadella.
document.longDescription:
Citadella Restaurant atop Gellért Hill serves lunch and dinner with sweeping Pest panoramas. Terrace tables fill at sunset for tourists hiking from the Liberty Statue. Menu on citadellarestaurant.hu.

Sources: https://www.citadellarestaurant.hu/
